title: Punched Better Fresher 3D books
description: this is a compatibility resourcepack between Punchy! and Better Fresher 3D books
body: ### Note: you HAVE to install Better, Fresher 3D books to use this pack Better, Fresher 3D books models aren't properly positioned with punchy, making it kinda bad to use, so i tried to fix it with this resource pack Before: ![show case of better, fresher 3D books before adding my resource pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/026ceb4ab1e138cc464b70e6670dcd15fd66c564.png) After: ![show case of better, fresher 3D books after adding my resource pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/tII5F49c/images/7437579ff36026a7756affd26a9ff52bdc8bcf11.png) also, be sure to always use the latest version of Punchy! please head to my discord server for feature requests, suggestions and bugs
